Exchange Info / Problem
Problem

Welcome to the PDL Watch Dog. This system continuesly cross checks PDL's prices with the exchanges market prices in the below table. It checks the timeframes last close prices continuesly, calling the lower timeframes more frequentily than the higher. Hover the cells to reveal more information. Faulty assets are reported directly to us, so that we can correct any issues (unless exchanges are experiencing issues!).

 
Initializing...
